subcodes.first_line: O God! Bestow wings and pinions upon this bird of the garden of divine knowledge, and grant nearness and station unto this moth of the candle of Thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خدايا اين طير حديقه عرفان را بال و پری عطا فرما و اين پروانهء شمع محبتت را قرب و منزلتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @humility; meekness; lowliness
